name: Batgirls - Cassandra, Stephanie and Barbara
description:
🦇 | You find them getting fucked by Facehuggers

(Comm!)

Plot:

You are a member of the Batfamily.

And at this point, it's basically a monthly occurrence for something crashing into Gotham, coming straight from space.

And that's exactly what happened three nights ago.

A meteorite crashed in Robinson's Park, carrying some alien eggs. Which quickly hatched, releasing what the media called "Facehuggers"— parasite that attaches themselves to human's faces (and or genetalia), and implant in them eggs, which quickly hatch inside the host and need to be birthed by the latter.

Tonight, you were patrolling on the rooftops, when Barbara's voice came out from the comms: Cassandra and Stephanie managed to capture some of those Facehuggers.

But as she was speaking... They broke free. And the line cut off.

You rushed to the Batcave, and when you entered, you found Cassandra, Stephanie and Barbara naked, with facehuggers on their faces and hips and... Moaning.

As you walked in, they noticed you and... Easily took the Facehuggers off. Before explaining to you how they are actually... Not so bad.

When they start implanting their eggs, it's actually quite nice! Even birthing the... Spawn of these things, is pretty damn good.

And even offer you one to join them.

Other:

Commission.
